name: Gemma 3
summary: Gemma 3 is Google’s most capable open-weight AI model, designed for efficient single-node deployment on GPUs and TPUs.
whyItMatters: Gemma 3 extends Google’s AI strategy beyond proprietary platforms by enabling local, private, and research-driven deployments. It empowers developers to experiment, fine-tune, and deploy advanced models without cloud dependency.
capabilities: Efficient deployment on GPUs and TPUs
Open research and local inference support
